task_completion.description: Verify HEIGHT_CM has numeric validation with minimum 100 and maximum 250.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the question settings or advanced settings for HEIGHT_CM showing minimum value of 100 and maximum value of 250.

task_completion.description: Verify WEIGHT_KG has numeric validation with minimum 30 and maximum 300.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the question settings or advanced settings for WEIGHT_KG showing minimum value of 30 and maximum value of 300.

task_completion.description: Verify an Equation question with code BMI_CALC exists that computes BMI from WEIGHT_KG and HEIGHT_CM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Equation type question with code BMI_CALC in the survey structure. The equation text should reference WEIGHT_KG and HEIGHT_CM with division and squaring operations to compute BMI.

task_completion.description: Verify an Equation question ELIG_SCORE exists that computes eligibility by awarding points for BMI range, no diabetes, no heart condition, and no blood thinners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Equation type question with code ELIG_SCORE. The formula should reference BMI_CALC (range 18.5-30), DIABETES, HEART_COND, and CURRENT_MEDS SQ004, combining boolean conditions into a score.

task_completion.description: Verify an Equation question RISK_DISPLAY exists showing eligibility summary with conditional ELIGIBLE/REVIEW REQUIRED text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Equation type question with code RISK_DISPLAY containing piped values for ELIG_SCORE and BMI_CALC, and conditional text using if() for ELIGIBLE vs REVIEW REQUIRED.

task_completion.description: Verify a 'Study Arm - Lifestyle Intervention' group exists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group named 'Study Arm' or 'Lifestyle Intervention' in the survey structure panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the Study Arm group has a relevance condition referencing ELIG_SCORE >= 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the group settings or relevance equation for the Study Arm group. It should contain ELIG_SCORE with a >= 3 condition.

task_completion.description: Verify a mandatory Array question DIET_HABITS exists with 4 sub-questions and a 5-point frequency scale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Array question with code DIET_HABITS containing sub-questions about Fruit/Vegetable, Processed Food, Sodium, Alcohol, with answer options Never through Daily.

task_completion.description: Verify Assessment mode is enabled for the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in Survey settings > Notifications & data or similar section for Assessment mode set to 'Yes' or enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify DIET_HABITS answer options have assessment values 1 through 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the answer options for DIET_HABITS showing assessment values: Never=1, Rarely=2, Sometimes=3, Often=4, Daily=5.

task_completion.description: Verify an assessment rule 'Poor Dietary Pattern' exists with score range 4-10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the Assessment rules section for a rule named 'Poor Dietary Pattern' with minimum 4, maximum 10, containing message about dietary counseling.

task_completion.description: Verify a quota 'Male Enrollment' exists with limit 200 linked to SEX=Male.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the Quotas section for a quota named 'Male Enrollment' with limit 200 and a member link to the SEX question answer 'Male'.

task_completion.description: Verify a quota 'Female Enrollment' exists with limit 200 linked to SEX=Female.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the Quotas section for a quota named 'Female Enrollment' with limit 200 and a member link to the SEX question answer 'Female'.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green 'Active' status badge, a 'Stop this survey' button, or the survey toolbar indicating the survey is currently active.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify equations were entered through the LimeSurvey question editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting equation text into the LimeSurvey question text field for Equation type questions.

integrity.description: Verify the group relevance condition was set via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent editing the group relevance equation field in LimeSurvey group settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey: 'Cardiovascular Risk Trial Screening (Protocol CVR-2025)'. Pre-existing questions: DOB (Date), SEX (List: Male/Female), HEIGHT_CM (Numerical), WEIGHT_KG (Numerical), DIABETES (Yes/No), HEART_COND (Yes/No), CURRENT_MEDS (Multiple Choice: SQ001-SQ005), ALLERGIES (Short Text). Agent must add: validation on HEIGHT_CM (100-250) and WEIGHT_KG (30-300); Equation BMI_CALC computing weight/(height/100)^2; Equation ELIG_SCORE awarding points for BMI 18.5-30, no diabetes, no heart condition, SQ004 not selected; Equation RISK_DISPLAY with conditional ELIGIBLE/REVIEW text; Group 'Study Arm - Lifestyle Intervention' with relevance ELIG_SCORE>=3; Array question DIET_HABITS (4 sub-q, 5-pt scale); Assessment mode with values 1-5 and rule 'Poor Dietary Pattern' (4-10); Quotas Male/Female 200 each linked to SEX; Activate survey.
